description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the java:8 Docker image and a mysql:5.7.20 service, sets MYSQL_DATABASE and MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD variables, and runs a before_script that changes to the backend directory and makes the Maven wrapper executable. Define two stages: compile and test. Add a maven_compile job in the compile stage that executes ./mvnw compile. Add a maven_test job in the test stage that executes ./mvnw test. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are needed.
